title: bidens chrysantha
intro: Bidens chrysantha, also known as the cutleaf beggar-ticks, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and distinctive leaf shape. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Bidens chrysantha are believed to include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and alleviating pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
